title: Repository Roadmap
content_html:
Repository Roadmap

Repository roadmap items cross app ownership or improve the way the repository is maintained.

Features

  • Repository Maintenance — curated links to concrete gaps retained in durable documentation.
  • Search Mechanics — index composition, ranking, and efficiency inside the current search structure.
  • Source Documentation And Linting — possible JSDoc, docstring, Ruff, and ESLint conventions.

The maintenance index is not a backlog. The other features remain ideas until a coherent delivery is worth scheduling.
